Title: Register a New User
Test Steps:
1. User calls registerUser() on Main.
2. Main calls getData() on User.
3. User returns data to Main.
4. Main calls verifyValidData() on UsersDatabase.
5. UsersDatabase returns verification result to Main.
6. Main calls saveUserData() on UsersDatabase.
Expected Result:
- If verification is successful, Main sends "ok" to User.
- If verification fails, Main sends "error" to User.

Title: Login with Valid Credentials
Preconditions: User registered and saved in Users Database
Test Steps:
1. User sends login request (email, password) to Main.
2. Main requests user validation (email, password) from Users Database.
3. Users Database returns true if user is valid.
4. Main sends "ok" response to User.
Expected Result: - User receives "ok" response indicating successful login.

Title: Login with Invalid Credentials
Preconditions: User registered and saved in Users Database
Test Steps:
1. User sends login request (email, password) to Main.
2. Main requests user validation (email, password) from Users Database.
3. Users Database returns false if user is invalid.
4. Main sends "error" response to User.
Expected Result: - User receives "error" response indicating failed login.

Title: Update Trip Data Successfully
Preconditions: User logged in and has created a trip
Test Data: - New Trip Details: City: "Paris", Country: "France", FinalDate: "2023-12-31"
Test Steps:
1. User initiates updateTrip() on Main.
2. Main calls getNewData().
3. Main calls updateTripData(x) on Trips Database.
4. Main lists trip data back to User using listTrip().
Expected Result: - Trip data is updated successfully and listed back to User.

Title: Update Trip Data with Invalid Data
Preconditions: User logged in and has created a trip
Test Data: - Invalid Trip Details: City: "", Country: "", FinalDate: ""
Test Steps:
1. User initiates updateTrip() on Main.
2. Main calls getNewData().
3. Main attempts to call updateTripData(x) on Trips Database but fails due to invalid data.
4. Main lists trip data back to User using listTrip().
Expected Result: - Trip data remains unchanged and an error message is displayed to User.

Title: Change Profile Successfully
Test Data: - New Profile Data: Name: "Jane Doe", Email: "jane.doe@example.com"
Test Steps:
1. User initiates changeProfile() on Main.
2. Main requests new data from User.
3. User provides new data to Main.
4. Main sends data to Users Database for verification.
5. Users Database returns verification result to Main.
6. Main updates user data in Users Database.
7. Main informs User of successful change.
Expected Result: - User's profile is updated successfully and User receives confirmation.

Title: Change Profile with Invalid Data
Test Steps:
1. User initiates changeProfile() on Main.
2. Main requests new data from User.
3. User provides new data to Main.
4. Main sends data to Users Database for verification.
5. Users Database returns verification result to Main.
6. Main does not update user data in Users Database.
7. Main informs User of error.
Expected Result: - User's profile remains unchanged and User receives an error message.

Title: Create a New Trip
Test Steps:
1. User creates a new Trip.
2. Trip is associated with a Plan.
3. Plan contains multiple DailyPlans.
4. Each DailyPlan has associated Weather information.
5. Places to Visit are categorized and included in the Trip.
Expected Result: - New Trip is created successfully with all associated details.

Title: Create a Trip with Missing Information
Test Data: - Incomplete Trip Details: City: "", Country: "", FinalDate: ""
Test Steps:
1. User attempts to create a new Trip with missing information.
2. System prevents creation of Trip due to incomplete details.
Expected Result: - Trip creation fails and an error message is displayed to User.

Title: Retrieve User Information
Test Steps:
1. User requests their information.
2. System retrieves User data including Username, Password, Name, and Email.
Expected Result: - User information is retrieved successfully and displayed to User.

Title: Retrieve Nonexistent User Information
Test Steps:
1. User requests information for a nonexistent user.
2. System attempts to retrieve User data but fails.
Expected Result: - An error message is displayed indicating the user does not exist.

Title: Add Place to Visit to a Trip
Preconditions: User logged in and has created a Trip
Test Steps:
1. User adds a new Place to Visit to their Trip.
2. Place is associated with a Category.
3. Place is included in the Trip.
Expected Result: - Place to Visit is added successfully to the Trip.

Title: Add Place to Visit with Invalid Category
Preconditions: User logged in and has created a Trip
Test Steps:
1. User attempts to add a new Place to Visit with an invalid Category.
2. System prevents addition of Place to Visit due to invalid Category.
Expected Result: - Place to Visit addition fails and an error message is displayed to User.

Title: Retrieve Daily Plans for a Trip
Preconditions: User logged in and has created a Trip
Test Steps:
1. User requests Daily Plans for their Trip.
2. System retrieves Daily Plans associated with the Trip.
3. Each Daily Plan has associated Weather information.
Expected Result: - Daily Plans and associated Weather information are retrieved successfully and displayed to User.

Title: Retrieve Daily Plans for Nonexistent Trip
Test Steps:
1. User requests Daily Plans for a nonexistent Trip.
2. System attempts to retrieve Daily Plans but fails.
Expected Result: - An error message is displayed indicating the Trip does not exist.

Title: Retrieve Weather Information for a Daily Plan
Preconditions: User logged in and has created a Trip with Daily Plans
Test Steps:
1. User requests Weather information for a Daily Plan.
2. System retrieves Weather information associated with the Daily Plan.
Expected Result: - Weather information is retrieved successfully and displayed to User.

Title: Retrieve Weather Information for Nonexistent Daily Plan
Test Steps:
1. User requests Weather information for a nonexistent Daily Plan.
2. System attempts to retrieve Weather information but fails.
Expected Result: - An error message is displayed indicating the Daily Plan does not exist.

Title: Retrieve Category Information
Test Steps:
1. User requests Category information.
2. System retrieves Category information including Name and Icon.
Expected Result: - Category information is retrieved successfully and displayed to User.

Title: Retrieve Category Information for Nonexistent Category
Test Steps:
1. User requests Category information for a nonexistent Category.
2. System attempts to retrieve Category information but fails.
Expected Result: - An error message is displayed indicating the Category does not exist.

Title: Retrieve Place to Visit Information
Preconditions: User logged in and has created a Trip with Places to Visit
Test Steps:
1. User requests Place to Visit information.
2. System retrieves Place to Visit information including Name and Category.
Expected Result: - Place to Visit information is retrieved successfully and displayed to User.

Title: Retrieve Place to Visit Information for Nonexistent Place
Test Steps:
1. User requests Place to Visit information for a nonexistent Place.
2. System attempts to retrieve Place to Visit information but fails.
Expected Result: - An error message is displayed indicating the Place to Visit does not exist.

Title: Retrieve Plan Information
Preconditions: User logged in and has created a Trip with a Plan
Test Steps:
1. User requests Plan information.
2. System retrieves Plan information including ID.
Expected Result: - Plan information is retrieved successfully and displayed to User.

Title: Retrieve Plan Information for Nonexistent Plan
Test Steps:
1. User requests Plan information for a nonexistent Plan.
2. System attempts to retrieve Plan information but fails.
Expected Result: - An error message is displayed indicating the Plan does not exist.

Title: Retrieve Trip Information
Preconditions: User logged in and has created a Trip
Test Steps:
1. User requests Trip information.
2. System retrieves Trip information including ID, City, Country, FinalDate, and PlanId.
Expected Result: - Trip information is retrieved successfully and displayed to User.

Title: Retrieve Trip Information for Nonexistent Trip
Test Steps:
1. User requests Trip information for a nonexistent Trip.
2. System attempts to retrieve Trip information but fails.
Expected Result: - An error message is displayed indicating the Trip does not exist.
